title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
This week, the S&P market has adopted a more cautious tone, however, a fair number of transactions have still materialized across segments. Activity appears more selective and targeted, with the market continuing to be shaped by firm price expectations from Sellers. Dry Cargo
In the Capesize sector, Japanese owners invited offers last week for the FRONTIER GARLAND (ABT 181K DWT, 2011, IMABARI) and is now reported sold to Greek interests at USD 36.4m.
